name: work-suite
description: The workflow primitive used by orchestrator agents: work-ideator (explore), work-planner (scope), work-doer (execute with TDD), work-merger (PR + merge) — plus autopilot (no-human-gates full-delivery and continuation discipline), stay-in-turn (CI/deploy wait discipline), and inch-worm (open-ended improvement loop). Vendor-neutral, engine-agnostic plugin bundle that mirrors the canonical skills under ouroboros-skills/skills/.
